# name: # One tab-separated row defines one end-to-end regression case:
# - name: unique case id used for logs and temporary directories.
# - family: group name for FILTER_FAMILY, for example base, tasking or halo.
# - sequential_source: reference program compiled with gcc and compared against.
# - np: MPI process count for the translated program; use - or 0 to run without mpirun.
# - args: runtime arguments; use - when there are none.
# - libs: extra compiler flags for generated code, such as -lm or -fopenmp -lm.
# - uses_runtime: yes when generated tasking code must link src/ompd_runtime.c and src/hash_map.c.
# - profile: result comparator; it checks computed output, not success text.
# - slow: yes skips the case unless RUN_SLOW=1 is set.
# - {output}: output file path expected by file-comparison profiles.
# labeled:label             compare a numeric value with tolerance
# integer:label             compare an exact integer value
# rows:width:indexes        compare selected numeric columns from table rows
# section:title             compare numbers printed after a section title
# board:title               compare a board made of O and .
# numeric-grid              compare a rows/columns/values output file
# binary:file               compare a file byte by byte
